response.overview: Daniella Charles is the hard-working manager of The Sundial Resort and Spa, located on a small island near the Florida coast. She has always dreamed of big accomplishments "someday," but she's in for a surprise when her meticulous work plans suddenly lead her to saving her hometown, and to love.
response.tagline: A hard-working resort manager on a small island off the Florida coast is in for a surprise when her meticulous work plans suddenly lead to saving her hometown, and to love.
response.title: Written in the Sand
